response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including Java and JVM-related work in past roles, but lacks focused, recent, or deep exposure to enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — key requirements for this role. His strengths lie in polyglot systems and open-source tooling, but the resume shows minimal evidence of IDE development, build tool integration, or JVM-level optimization work.
strengths: Proven experience with Java and JVM-related projects in past roles
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Excellent communication and teaching skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No recent or prominent experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise Java frameworks
Lack of demonstrated work on IDE internals, language servers, or code analysis tooling
Primary recent tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js, with Java appearing only as a minor or historical component
